question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/NodeSignatureVerifier.java -> Scope: High: Authorizing transactions without approval from signers/owners'] [Function: verify()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the mutable nature of the StreamFileSignature collection passed to verify(), by modifying the status of entries from DOWNLOADED to VERIFIED between the verifySignature() call and the consensusValidator.validate() call, causing unverified signatures to be counted toward consensus?
